creator: mx5arbc@hotmail.com
text:
These are the components included in the latest version of NAS4FREE 11.1 which includes the version of FREEBSD it's based on.   


BUILD 11.1.0.4.4528
===================
Changes:
- Upgrade to FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-P1.
- Update translations.
- Add option to make USB devices available in virtualbox-ose.
- Upgrade virtualbox-ose to 5.1.26.
- Upgrade php to 7.1.8.
- Upgrade samba to 4.6.6.
- Upgrade syncthing to 0.14.36.
- Upgrade e2fsprogs to 1.43.5.
